name: AuthZEN PDP — authorization inventory
description: Imports an AuthZEN-conformant authorization inventory into XORCISM's API Authorization Governance (/authz-governance): the Policy Decision Point (PDP) exposing the OpenID Foundation AuthZEN Authorization API 1.0 (POST /access/v1/evaluation), its policies, and the API gateways (PEP) that call it. AuthZEN (https://openid.net/wg/authzen/) is the vendor-neutral standard that lets any enforcement point talk to any decision point — so PDPs imported here are marked AuthZEN-conformant. Worker-safe & offline: pass `file` = an inventory JSON, or run with no config for the bundled sample. Normalized to authz_pdps / authz_gateways / authz_policies.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: An inventory JSON {pdps,gateways,policies}. Omit for the bundled sample.
